evals.name: Flags hardcoded secret as Critical finding
evals.description: Python code with a hardcoded password should produce a Critical finding with CR-NN ID format.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent flags the hardcoded password as a Critical finding with a CR-NN ID

evals.name: Flags bare except as Warning finding
evals.description: A bare except clause should produce a Warning finding with WR-NN ID format.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent flags the bare except as a Warning finding with a WR-NN ID

evals.name: Reports correct REVIEW.md output structure
evals.description: The skill should mention writing REVIEW.md and include a status summary line.
evals.prompt:
Review the Python files in this project. Here is utils.py:

import os

def get_files(path):
    # TODO: add error handling
    files = []
    for f in os.listdir(path):
        files.append(f)
    return files

rubric.pass_condition: Agent mentions writing REVIEW.md and flags the TODO as an Info finding

evals.name: Reports clean status when no issues found
evals.description: Clean Python code should result in a passing review with no critical or warning findings.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent reports a clean review with no critical or warning findings (no CR- or WR- IDs)
